step_rationale: Heme scavenging and oxidative defense; upregulated in ACS plaque inflammation.
mechanism: Hemopexin mitigates heme-mediated oxidative injury and inflammation during atherothrombotic plaque destabilization and myocardial ischemia.

references.title: Biomarker Discovery of Acute Coronary Syndrome Using Proteomic Approach.
Erythrocyte-heme proteins and STEMI: implications in prognosis.
